name: Fresh Mango
description: Sweet and juicy ripe mangoes from Rwanda's eastern province. Rich in vitamins and perfect for smoothies.
descriptionKin: Imyembe nziza y'icyatsi bivuye mu ntara y'iburasirazuba.
descriptionFr: Mangues mûres et juteuses de la province orientale du Rwanda.

name: Red Apples
description: Crispy and sweet red apples, rich in fiber and antioxidants. Perfect for snacking or baking.
descriptionKin: Tofali nziza zitukura, zuzuye ibitera imbaraga.
descriptionFr: Pommes rouges croquantes et sucrées, riches en fibres et antioxydants.

name: Banana Bunch
description: Fresh bananas harvested from local farms. High in potassium and natural energy.
descriptionKin: Imbiya nziza zakuwe mu murima. Zuzuye potasiyumu.
descriptionFr: Bananes fraîches récoltées dans des fermes locales.

name: Watermelon
description: Large, juicy watermelon perfect for hot days. 92% water content keeps you hydrated.
descriptionKin: Pome nini y'amazi, nziza mu gihe cy'urushwima.
descriptionFr: Grande pastèque juteuse parfaite pour les journées chaudes.

name: Pineapple
description: Sweet tropical pineapple loaded with vitamin C and digestive enzymes.
descriptionKin: Inanasi ryiza ry'ibituruzwa, rizuye vitamine C.
descriptionFr: Ananas tropical sucré chargé en vitamine C et enzymes digestives.

name: Fresh Spinach
description: Tender fresh spinach leaves, packed with iron, vitamins and minerals.
descriptionKin: Epinard mishya, zuzuye iron na vitamini.
descriptionFr: Feuilles d'épinards tendres, riches en fer, vitamines et minéraux.

name: Fresh Tomatoes
description: Ripe, juicy tomatoes perfect for cooking, salads and sauces.
descriptionKin: Inyanya nziza zikuze, nziza mu guteka n'ibitotsi.
descriptionFr: Tomates mûres et juteuses parfaites pour la cuisine, les salades et les sauces.

name: Broccoli
description: Fresh green broccoli, one of the most nutrient-dense vegetables available.
descriptionKin: Brokoli mishya y'icyatsi, imwe mu mboga zuzuye inzira.
descriptionFr: Brocoli vert frais, l'un des légumes les plus riches en nutriments.

name: Carrots
description: Sweet, crunchy carrots rich in beta-carotene and vitamin A.
descriptionKin: Karoti nziza zizuye beta-carotene na vitamine A.
descriptionFr: Carottes douces et croquantes riches en bêta-carotène et vitamine A.

name: Onions
description: Fresh yellow onions, essential ingredient for every kitchen.
descriptionKin: Iyungiyungi mishya, ikoreshwa mu ntebe z'aho hose.
descriptionFr: Oignons jaunes frais, ingrédient essentiel de toute cuisine.

name: Coca-Cola 500ml
description: Classic Coca-Cola refreshing drink. Cold and sparkling for ultimate refreshment.
descriptionKin: Coca-Cola isanzwe, ikonje kandi igurumana.
descriptionFr: Coca-Cola classique rafraîchissant. Froid et pétillant.

name: Orange Juice 1L
description: 100% natural orange juice, freshly squeezed with no added sugar.
descriptionKin: Inzoga y'icungwa 100% kamere, yatijwe nta sukari yongewemo.
descriptionFr: Jus d'orange 100% naturel, fraîchement pressé sans sucre ajouté.

name: Mineral Water 1.5L
description: Pure mineral water from natural Rwandan springs. Stay hydrated.
descriptionKin: Amazi misozi meza avuye mu misozi y'u Rwanda. Komera amazi.
descriptionFr: Eau minérale pure des sources naturelles rwandaises.

name: Primus Beer 650ml
description: Rwanda's favorite lager beer. Refreshing and smooth.
descriptionKin: Inzoga ya Primus y'u Rwanda, igurumana kandi nziza.
descriptionFr: Bière lager préférée du Rwanda. Rafraîchissante et douce.

name: Milk 1L
description: Fresh whole milk, rich in calcium and protein for strong bones.
descriptionKin: Amata mashya, azuye kalisiyumu na poriteyine z'amagufwa makomeye.
descriptionFr: Lait entier frais, riche en calcium et en protéines.

name: Pringles Original
description: Classic Pringles original flavor. Perfectly stacked, irresistibly crispy.
descriptionKin: Pringles isanzwe, atanze neza, agurumana nziza.
descriptionFr: Saveur originale Pringles classique. Parfaitement empilé, irrésistiblement croustillant.

name: Chocolate Bar
description: Rich dark chocolate bar made from finest cocoa beans. A sweet indulgence.
descriptionKin: Chocola nziza y'umukara, yakozwe mu bikoko nziza.
descriptionFr: Riche tablette de chocolat noir faite à partir des meilleurs fèves de cacao.

name: Lay's Classic Chips
description: America's favorite potato chips. Light, crispy and perfectly salted.
descriptionKin: Chips nziza za Lay's. Yoroheje, igurumana kandi ifite umunyu nziza.
descriptionFr: Chips de pommes de terre préférées d'Amérique. Légères, croustillantes et parfaitement salées.

name: Washing Powder 2kg
description: Powerful cleaning powder that removes tough stains. Suitable for all fabrics.
descriptionKin: Ufu wo gukaraba ukuyaho amabara nka hembe. Akora ku mwenda wose.
descriptionFr: Lessive puissante qui élimine les taches tenaces. Convient à tous les tissus.

name: Dish Soap 750ml
description: Effective dish soap that cuts through grease and leaves dishes sparkling clean.
descriptionKin: Savon nziza yo kwoza ibikombe, ikuraho amavuta no gutera uruhinja.
descriptionFr: Liquide vaisselle efficace qui élimine la graisse et laisse la vaisselle étincelante.

name: White Bread
description: Freshly baked white bread, soft and fluffy. Perfect for sandwiches.
descriptionKin: Umutsima w'umweru mushya, woroheje kandi mwiza. Nziza ku sandwichi.
descriptionFr: Pain blanc fraîchement cuit au four, moelleux et aéré. Parfait pour les sandwichs.

name: Eggs (Tray of 30)
description: Farm fresh eggs, rich in protein. Laid daily from free-range hens.
descriptionKin: Amagi mashya avuye mu murima, azuye poriteyine. Avuye mu nkoko z'inzira.
descriptionFr: Œufs frais de ferme, riches en protéines. Pondus quotidiennement par des poules élevées en plein air.

name: Chicken Breast 1kg
description: Lean chicken breast fillet, high in protein and low in fat.
descriptionKin: Igituba cy'inkoko gifite poriteyine nyinshi n'amavuta make.
descriptionFr: Filet de blanc de poulet maigre, riche en protéines et faible en matières grasses.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy Greek yogurt. High in protein and probiotics for gut health.
descriptionKin: Yogurt nziza yo mu Girikiya, igumye kandi yuzuye poriteyine.
descriptionFr: Yaourt grec épais et crémeux. Riche en protéines et probiotiques pour la santé intestinale.

name: Avocado
description: Creamy Hass avocados, packed with healthy fats and nutrients.
descriptionKin: Avoka ya Hass nziza, yuzuye amavuta meza na inzira.
descriptionFr: Avocats Hass crémeux, riches en graisses saines et en nutriments.

name: Green Tea 20 Bags
description: Premium green tea bags rich in antioxidants. Fresh and invigorating taste.
descriptionKin: Icyayi cy'icyatsi nziza, kizuye antioxidants. Ufite taste nziza.
descriptionFr: Sachets de thé vert premium riches en antioxydants. Goût frais et vivifiant.

name: Pasta 500g
description: Premium Italian pasta. Perfect for spaghetti bolognese and all pasta dishes.
descriptionKin: Pasta nziza y'Ubutaliyano. Nziza ku pasta zose.
descriptionFr: Pâtes italiennes premium. Parfaites pour les spaghettis bolognaise et tous les plats de pâtes.

name: Cooking Oil 2L
description: Pure vegetable cooking oil. Light and healthy for all your cooking needs.
descriptionKin: Amavuta meza yo guteka. Yoroheje kandi meza ku buzima.
descriptionFr: Huile de cuisson végétale pure. Légère et saine pour tous vos besoins culinaires.
